legend.note: FAIL = not done, broken, or rejected. PENDING_REVIEW = built and packet emitted, awaiting reviewer verdict. PASS = reviewed, approved, merged, and verified. The executor may set PENDING_REVIEW but NEVER PASS — PASS is set by the human/reviewer after approval. The maker does not grade its own work.
legend.priority: lower number = higher priority; agent picks the highest-priority FAIL

features.name: Security & production-hardening review pass (checklist + threat-model step)
features.verify: templates/SECURITY_CHECKLIST.md exists; SPRINT_CONTRACT has Threat model section; REVIEW_CHECKLIST has security gate; README lists 6 templates; root FEATURES.json valid
features.notes: Reviewer approved SEC-001 with SEC-001b as one docs-only unit; stacking rule waived for docs-only changes.

features.name: Review Packet protocol (ephemeral executor→reviewer context handoff)
features.verify: templates/REVIEW_PACKET.md exists; REVIEW_CHECKLIST split into Tier1/Tier2; EXECUTOR_HANDOFF emits packet; HARNESS.md has 'Review the packet' subsection; .gitignore has .harness/; README lists 7 templates; root FEATURES.json valid
features.notes: Reviewer verified packet sufficiency from the packet alone; ephemeral packet deleted after PASS.

features.name: Default-branch field in agent context
features.verify: templates/AGENTS.md has a generic Default branch placeholder under How we work here; no real branch name is hardcoded; root FEATURES.json valid

features.name: Self-enforcing Review Packet criteria keying
features.verify: templates/REVIEW_PACKET.md has the two-step fill instruction; warns not to substitute handoff verify-steps; per-criterion table columns unchanged; root FEATURES.json valid

features.name: Harness-workflow safety (prompt-injection defense, human-gated side effects, least-privilege executor)
features.verify: HARNESS.md has Workflow safety after the control audit with observed-content, human-gated side effects, and least-privilege principles; REVIEW_CHECKLIST Tier 2 has Workflow safety checkboxes; root FEATURES.json valid
features.notes: Merged in SEC-BUNDLE-001; reviewer APPROVED (read cold).

features.name: Machine-readable criteria block for contract, handoff, and packet
features.verify: SPRINT_CONTRACT has a canonical criteria fenced block; EXECUTOR_HANDOFF carries a criteria block and tells the Executor to paste it verbatim into the packet; REVIEW_PACKET says to paste the handoff criteria block; table columns unchanged; root FEATURES.json valid
features.notes: Merged; reviewer APPROVED — first verbatim-criteria packet.

features.name: One-command kit installer
features.verify: install.sh exists, is executable, POSIX sh, copies HARNESS.md, SETUP.md, LOOP.md, and templates, scaffolds AGENTS.md and FEATURES.json only when absent, writes .harness/VERSION, updates target .gitignore idempotently, runs twice against a throwaway git repo without duplicate lines or overwrites, README has Install section, root FEATURES.json valid
features.notes: Executor emitted packet; awaiting independent reviewer verdict. Installer performs no git stage/commit/push and no network calls.

features.name: Brownfield adoption detects repo's existing default branch (don't assume main)
features.verify: ADOPTION.md A1 instructs detecting the default branch via git and writing it to the AGENTS.md Default-branch field; ADOPTION.md states the adopt-don't-impose principle; root FEATURES.json valid

features.name: Loop-readiness seam (LOOP.md + loop state template)
features.verify: LOOP.md has loop-above-harness framing, primitive mapping, automation-precondition rule, worktree parallelism, trusted-verifier caveat, and loop-ready-not-loop-on statement; templates/STATE.md has loop/triage state sections; README lists both files; root FEATURES.json valid
features.notes: Merged; reviewer APPROVED after reading the precondition rule in full.

features.name: Three-state feature status model with manual transition owners
features.verify: templates/FEATURES.json defines FAIL, PENDING_REVIEW, PASS; HARNESS.md documents manual transition owners and post-merge actions; REVIEW_CHECKLIST documents verdict transitions; root FEATURES.json reconciles merged features and remains valid
features.notes: Executor emitted packet; awaiting independent reviewer verdict. No status-changing automation.

features.name: Dedicated kit update script with version bump and drift report
features.verify: update.sh exists, is executable, POSIX sh, refuses non-git or non-installed targets, refreshes only kit-owned files, preserves AGENTS.md and FEATURES.json, writes .harness/VERSION, reports FEATURES.json legend drift without migrating, README documents Update, root FEATURES.json valid
features.notes: Executor emitted packet; awaiting independent reviewer verdict. Update performs no git stage/commit/push, no network calls, and no auto-migration.

features.name: Runnable setup flow for greenfield, brownfield, and existing AI docs
features.verify: SETUP.md exists as a checklist with Greenfield, Brownfield, and Brownfield-with-existing-AI-docs paths; each step has an actor and done condition; README lists SETUP.md; root FEATURES.json valid
features.notes: Executor emitted packet; awaiting independent reviewer verdict. README carries the conceptual reference.

features.name: Fold adoption concepts into README and delete the legacy adoption doc
features.verify: README has a concise Adoption concepts section; the legacy adoption doc is deleted; live references redirect to SETUP.md or README Adoption concepts; post-deletion grep shows only allowed historical audit strings; root FEATURES.json valid
features.notes: Executor emitted packet; awaiting independent reviewer verdict. SETUP.md owns runnable steps; README owns adoption concepts.
